name: claude-vibe-squad
description: Vibe Squad multi-model agent harness with vendored runtime MCP plugins.

plugins.name: chrono-vault
plugins.description: KG state machine + Obsidian REST + auto-capture. Includes namespace aliases for chrono-kg / chrono-obsidian / chrono-catalog so legacy archive role plugins keep working.

plugins.name: chrono-research-arsenal
plugins.description: External research arsenal: arxiv_search + xai_search + Perplexity Sonar (via official MCP). Used by all chrono roles needing external data.

plugins.name: chrono-media-studio
plugins.description: Image/video/audio generation. Wired today: OpenAI image+video, Gemini audio. Sibling MCPs declared: Higgsfield (HTTP), ElevenLabs (uvx). Owner role: content-creator.

plugins.name: chrono-recon
plugins.description: OSINT recon tools for Vibe Squad specialists (dns, whois, crt.sh, wayback, github leaked-secrets). Owner roles: scout, security-analyst, exploit-developer.
